product_brief: The first quantum-safe fork of Bitcoin, serving as a live testnet environment and liquidity bridge for quantum-threatened digital assets.
pqc_capability_description: Live testnet (V3) exceeding 50 miners and 200,000 blocks. Implements BIP 360 to replace ECDSA with NIST-standardized ML-DSA. Described as a quantum-resistant version of Bitcoin Core. Mainnet targets planned for 2026.
architecture_type: Blockchain protocol fork with post-quantum signature replacement
regulatory_status: Referenced in Post Quantum Financial Infrastructure Framework submitted to the SEC; QPoW recognized as QuINSA consensus work item.
pqc_roadmap_details: Testnet launched Jan 2026; BIP 360 deployed March 2026; mainnet readiness targeted for 2026. Replaces ECDSA with ML-DSA.
consensus_mechanism: Not stated (implied PoW via "Bitcoin fork" and "miners", but specific mechanism not explicitly named in text)

product_name: Project Eleven Solana PQC Testnet / yellowpages
product_brief: Post-quantum cryptographic infrastructure and testnet for securing digital assets on Solana and Bitcoin.
pqc_capability_description: Deployed a production-grade registry ("yellowpages") for Bitcoin allowing PQC key generation linked to existing addresses. Built and open-sourced the first post-quantum testnet for Solana, replacing standard EdDSA with NIST-standardized ML-DSA. Demonstrates practical end-to-end quantum-resistant transactions.
crypto_primitives: Ed25519 (EdDSA), ML-DSA (Module-Lattice Digital Signature Algorithm), Elliptic Curve Cryptography (ECC)
pqc_roadmap_details: Focus on migrating decentralized networks from ECC to quantum-resilient foundations; includes readiness assessments, migration test environments, and deployment sequencing. Future roadmap includes distributed entanglement, certified randomness, and quantum money.

product_brief: A cloud-native, modular core banking platform enabling real-time processing and API-driven innovation.
pqc_capability_description: The document mentions "Built-in security" and "Enhanced security" but contains no explicit mention of Post-Quantum Cryptography (PQC), PQC algorithms, or migration plans.
architecture_type: Cloud-native, modular, componentized architecture with open APIs.
primary_platforms: Public cloud, Private cloud, Hybrid cloud environments.
